name: Review Engine Changes
description: Reviews changes to recommendation engine files to ensure they still reference Channel DNA and don't produce generic advice

then.prompt: An engine file was modified. Verify that: 1) All recommendation functions still accept and use ChannelDNA as a parameter, 2) No generic advice like 'post consistently' is generated, 3) Scoring functions return values in the 0-100 range, 4) The function has proper TypeScript return types.
